headline: Ford Recalls 4 Million Vehicles And What It May Mean For Investors
summary: Ford Motor (NYSE:F) has announced major recalls affecting more than 4,000,000 vehicles in the U.S. Issues involve software errors tied to trailer lighting and braking systems. Additional recalls address safety concerns related to suspension components. Remedies include a mix of software updates and hardware repairs across affected models. For an automaker the size of Ford, large scale recalls touch core parts of the business, from product perception to warranty costs. The company is a key...

headline: Will Ford's Low-Cost EV Pivot Strengthen Its Market Position?
summary: F is overhauling its EV strategy with a $30,000 next-generation model and leaner design, betting a $5 billion pivot can boost efficiency and fend off rivals.

raw.headline: Will Ford's Low-Cost EV Pivot Strengthen Its Market Position?

headline: Ford, GM, Stellantis Slip Amid Oil Price Surge As US-Iran War Escalates
summary: Automakers Ford, GM and Stellantis see stock decline as U.S.-Iran war escalates and oil prices surge globally.
